actix.description: Actix-web 4 with rustls for HTTP/2 support, compiled with -O3 and thin LTO.

aspnet-minimal.description: Minimal ASP.NET Core server using .NET 10 preview with Kestrel and minimal API routing.

caddy.description: Caddy web server with a custom handler module for benchmark endpoints, native HTTP/2 support.

deno.description: Deno HTTP server using deno serve --parallel with zero-dependency native fetch handler.

drogon.description: Drogon C++ framework with sync advice for fast dispatch, mimalloc allocator, and -flto optimization.

express.description: Express.js on Node.js with cluster mode, etag/x-powered-by disabled, raw writeHead responses.

flask.description: Flask web framework on Gunicorn with sync workers, one worker per CPU core.

go-fasthttp.description: High-performance Go HTTP server using fasthttp with zero-allocation design and buffer reuse.

h2o.description: High-performance C HTTP server using libh2o with multi-threaded event loops and native HTTP/2 support.

h2o-mruby.description: h2o config-based server with mruby handlers and native HTTP/3 (QUIC) support.

hyper.description: Low-level HTTP library for Rust, built on tokio with multi-threaded async runtime.

lithium.description: Lithium C++ HTTP framework with compile-time reflection, boost::context coroutines, and -O3 -march=native -flto.

nginx.description: Nginx with a custom C handler module, compiled with -O3 -march=native.

node.description: Bare Node.js HTTP server using the cluster module for multi-core scaling.

quarkus-jvm.description: Quarkus with RESTEasy Reactive on Vert.x/Netty, JDK 21, optimized JVM tuning.

ringzero.description: Custom C HTTP server built on io_uring with a multi-reactor architecture. No epoll, no thread-per-connection.

salvo.description: Salvo web framework with Quinn HTTP/3 support on Tokio runtime, compiled with -O3 and thin LTO.

spring-jvm.description: Spring Boot with embedded Tomcat on JDK 21 (HotSpot JVM with ZGC).

spring-jvm-jetty.description: Spring Boot with embedded Jetty 12 on JDK 21, supporting HTTP/1.1 and HTTP/2.
